titleStmt.title: SII 33.14: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 14. (A.R. No. 120 of 1946.) Cherlōpalle (hamlet of Santakōvūru), Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in the dilapidated site of the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated in Śaka 1459, Hēmaḷaṁbi, Śrāvaṇa ba. 1, Saturday, corresponding to 1537 A.D., July 7, Saturday, f.d.t. °21 (ba. is a mistake for śu.).

Records a gift of land for daily offerings to the god Chennakēśava at Mārakapuram, a suburb of Cherlōpalle, by Timmināyaka, son of Timmināyaka of Penugoṇḍa. The ceded village is stated to have been bestowed as amara fief to the donor by Peda-Tirumalarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
yanamaḥ svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1459 Agunēṭi hē
maḷaṁbi nāma saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 1 sa (śa) śrīmatu Utpatti stitilaya
kāraṇa Akhilāṁḍa kōṭibrahmaṁḍa nāyaka yiśvarēśvaruṁḍaina yī
saṁvatsarāna cerlōpallenu beṁbaḍi vuṁnna mārakapuraṁ cennakēśvarūni
divya śrī pādapadmaṁbulaku dāsānadāsuḍainapenugoṁḍatiṁmminā
yani komāruḍu tiṁmmināyaṁḍu Anaṁtamulaina daṁḍamu
lu samarppiṁcciri rājāpedatirumalrājayyavāru
māku Amarānku pāliṁccina yīcerlonu svāmi Amṛta
paḍiki samarppiṁcina kṣētraṁ vūri venkabaḍi nāgasaḷtaṁ cēnu 10 gu nnuka
kāṇika mā ninku paḍamaṭi guḍi staḷaṁ 11 nnuju kuṁṭa saḷta ce 2 nnu
paḍi Ā tukālu rayararegaḍa saḷtana 2 nu vubha
yaṁ staḷālunu cēnu samarpṣiṁstini yī
grāmaṁreḍi karāṇālu ne veṁka vuṁḍu
koṁḍa konayanu nilipitimi gā
ṁna Ayarna Avadhariṁccēdi tiruvārā
dhana Ava(rauvvaḍi) yī dharmmānku yavvaru tappinānu śrī raṁgamaṁ
ddu gobāṁhmaṇu vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōduru
Digital edition of SII 33.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
